compressed_context:
ACTORS: CANADA ∧ US ∧ CHINA WITHDRAW FROM EU-ETS PHASE-1 INTERNATIONAL-SCOPE  
RATIONALE: FEAR OF MARKET-DAMPENING ∧ PRESSURE ON MEMBER-STATES  
CTX: CITE:212 EC[COM05] POSTPONES INTERNATIONAL-SCOPE UNTIL ICAO AGREEMENT  
ICAO: PROPOSES CORSIA(OFFSET-BASED MARKET-MEASURE)  
DEF: CORSIA=CARBON-OFFSETTING MARKET-SCHEME FOR INTERNATIONAL-AVIATION  
EU-AMENDMENT: REMOVE INTERNATIONAL-SCOPE PHASE-1 ∧ RETAIN DOMESTIC-FLIGHTS  
IMPACT: EU-BUDGET-AIRLINES CAUGHT BETWEEN REGULATION ∧ COMPETITIVE-DISADVANTAGE  
  VS 3RD-COUNTRY AIRLINES  
TENSION: INTERNALISATION VS MARKET-PRESERVATION  

DEF: CLIMATE-CHANGE DRIVEN BY MULTI-SECTOR EMISSIONS  
DETAILS: SECTORS={ELECTRICITY-GENERATION ∧ HEAVY-INDUSTRIES ∧ TRANSPORT}  
OBSERVATION: EMISSIONS CHARACTER-DEPENDENT AT EVERY ASPECT OF DAILY-LIFE
